creator: malet18@yahoo.com
text:
I have installed FreeBSD on the IBM X346 Server w/ 7k raid controller and
built-in ATI Radeon 7000 Video. The installation finished and it work well
in text mode. But when I run it in graphical mode, an error appeared in ATI
Radeon Video. I think the problem is the driver of the ATI Radeon, how can
I install the driver of the ATI Radeon, so it can run in graphical mode.

How-To-Repeat: Install the driver of ATI Radeon Video.
